rationale: Radio option for underlying filing type. Enum value 'articles_of_entity_conversion' (13-C MRSA §955.1).

label_verbatim: Articles/Certificate of Merger or Share Exchange (13-C MRSA §1106, 31 MRSA §744, 31 MRSA §1436) [option 2]
Articles of Conversion of Partnership (31 MRSA §1093) [option 5]
FIRST: The name of the registered limited liability partnership is — must contain 'Limited Liability Partnership', 'L.L.P.' or 'LLP' (per 31 MRSA §803-A)
rationale: Top-of-form LLP name. Domestic Maine filing — uses entity.name (not entity.home_jurisdiction_name). Must contain LLP suffix per 31 MRSA §803-A.
Radio option for Commercial Registered Agent. Enum value 'commercial'. Same key family as MLLP-6A, MLLP-12, FICT-4.

label_verbatim: SECOND: CRA Public Number (alongside Commercial Registered Agent radio)
rationale: CRA Public Number, required when registered_agent.type = 'commercial'.
Name of the commercial registered agent. Synth fills exactly one of Text3 / Text4 based on registered_agent.type.
Radio option for Noncommercial Registered Agent. Enum value 'noncommercial'.
Name of the noncommercial registered agent (alternative slot to Text3). Same canonical key — exactly one is filled per registered_agent.type.

label_verbatim: SECOND: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Physical address of the registered agent in Maine (single-line: street, city, state, zip; not P.O. Box).

label_verbatim: SECOND: (mailing address if different from above)
rationale: Mailing address of the registered agent (when different from physical).

label_verbatim: FOURTH: This is a professional limited liability partnership* formed pursuant to 13 MRSA, chapter 22-A to provide the following professional services
rationale: Boolean elect-in for professional LLP status under 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A. Same key as LLP_MLLP-12. When true, entity.professional_services_description.line{1,2} must be populated.
First line of the professional-services description. Multi-line shape primitive — same as LLP_MLLP-12, LP_MLPA-12-1.
Second line of the professional-services description.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The name and business, residence or mailing address of the contact partner is: Name
rationale: Name of the LLP's designated contact partner. Same key as LLP_MLLP-6A, LLP_MLLP-9.
Combined business/residence/mailing address of the contact partner (single-line widget; no street/city split). Same key as LLP_MLLP-6A, LLP_MLLP-9.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: Other provisions of this certificate, if any, that the partners determine to include are set forth in Exhibit ___ attached hereto and made a part hereof.
rationale: Single-letter exhibit reference for additional certificate provisions. Same key as LLP_MLLP-6A, MBCA-6, MLPA-6.
